title: zieria obovata
intro: Zieria obovata, also known as the Lemon Myrtle or Lemon-scented Bush, is a small shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Zieria obovata have been used in herbal medicine for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Zieria obovata are often used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
